package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
)

// scenario for repeated_json_marshaling: encoding/json.Marshal or MarshalIndent inside loops - repeated allocation and serialization hot spots.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule631PositiveRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario631Positive(values []Rule631PositiveRecord) (int, error) {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range values {
		data, err := json.Marshal(value)
		if err != nil { return 0, err }
		total += len(data)
	}
	return total, nil
}
